bot_credentials.block_note: Admin warned on May 17 to read WP:BOTP and declare WP:COI. Block applied May 19 after continued edits. Allowusertalk is permitted (account can still post on own talk page only).

decline_1.reason: Does not indicate importance or notability

decline_2.reason: Does not meet WP:BIO criteria; YouTube and Vimeo not considered reliable sources; unusual referencing style

reviewer_comments.note: IMDb is not a reliable source (WP:IMDB)
In 20 years of editing here I have not come across this referencing style...and YouTube and Vimeo are not considered reliable sources

Notability doesn't hinge on the existence of the subject's work, it hinges on WP:GNG quality of referencing. We need media coverage ABOUT him (newspapers, magazines, books). YouTube, Vimeo, self-published websites of affiliated organizations, and other Wikipedia articles are not acceptable GNG-building references.

root_causes: Draft swelled to 46KB with 50+ YouTube and Vimeo citations used as inline references
IMVDb (user-editable database) still present despite earlier remediation
Wikipedia article used as source for Dine Alone Records
Self-published portfolio site amosleblanc.com used as source
Autobiography tag added by reviewer due to article reading as self-written
Account flagged by admin Asilvering for LLM use on May 17, ignored, then blocked May 19

prepared_revision.description: Full cleanup prepared on 2026-05-20 but could not be posted due to block. Removes all YouTube, Vimeo, IMVDb, Wikipedia, and self-published citations. Retains 20 independent trade-press sources only. Article reduced from 46KB to 14KB. File saved at brain note below.
sources_removed: Saatchi and Saatchi own press release

Draft:Amos Le Blanc.notes: Wikipedia work is fully stopped. The account is permanently blocked. No further edits possible from this account. See recommended_path_forward below.

targets.title: artonly.io
targets.reason: Site too new. Requires independent coverage first. Check again after 3rd-party publications write about artonly.

targets.title: Amos Le Blanc (film director)
targets.notes: Draft exists at Draft:Amos Le Blanc. Twice declined. Account blocked. Requires human intervention.

option_1_appeal.description: Appeal the block on User talk:Neverendersinc or via Wikipedia:Unblock requests
requirements: Acknowledge the COI: the article is about a client of artonly.io, not a neutral editor's choice
Commit in writing to no further LLM-assisted editing
Declare WP:PAID or WP:COI relationship per Wikipedia policy
Accept that the autobiography framing must be corrected
option_1_appeal.likelihood: Low. Infinite blocks for LLM and COI are rarely lifted without strong evidence of changed behavior and full disclosure.
option_1_appeal.caution: Do NOT attempt to post on the talk page using this agent. Any talk-page post that reads as LLM-generated will deepen the problem.

option_2_independent_editor.description: Hire an independent Wikipedia editor with no COI to submit the article
requirements: Editor must not be employed by or affiliated with artonly.io or Amos Le Blanc
Editor must disclose any paid relationship per WP:PAID if applicable
Editor should write the article from scratch using only the strong sources identified
Suggested starting sources: LBBOnline 2016 and 2019, shots.net 2016, Campaign US 2021, The One Club 2019, Ad Age 2013
option_2_independent_editor.likelihood: High if genuinely notable sources support the article
option_2_independent_editor.note: The prepared_revision in this brain.json documents the correct source list and article structure for a human editor to reference.

option_3_wait.description: Wait for an independent editor to create the article organically
option_3_wait.note: Winning the Young Director Award twice plus Young Guns 17 and MMVA Director of the Year may attract organic Wikipedia coverage eventually. No action needed.

what_not_to_do: Do NOT create a new Wikipedia account to continue editing (block evasion)
Do NOT attempt to edit via IP addresses
Do NOT use this agent to post anything to Wikipedia using these credentials
Do NOT attempt to edit the draft or talk page from this account

strategy.priority_1: Resolve account block before any further Wikipedia work is attempted
strategy.priority_2: If block is resolved or new approach taken: post the prepared_revision to Draft:Amos Le Blanc
strategy.priority_3: Find 3rd-party coverage of artonly.io before attempting artonly article
strategy.reviewer_engagement: Always thank reviewers by name, respond on talk page within 24h, be specific about what changed
strategy.source_quality: LBBOnline, shots.net, Campaign US, Ad Age, The One Club = strong. IMVDb = never. YouTube = never. Vimeo = never.
